title: SourceRecord
description: Provenance record for one ingested art item.

source_id.description: Stable unique ID for this source item, e.g. src_20260417_001

image_url.description: Direct URL to the image file if separately resolvable

local_image_path.description: Relative path to downloaded image file, if downloaded

approved_source.description: Must be true. Ingestion must be blocked if false.

approved_source_id.description: Reference to registry entry in data/sources/approved_sources.json

date_created.description: Known creation date of the artwork, free text

access_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this URL was accessed

rights_flag.description: Best-known rights status at time of ingest

duplicate_of.description: source_id of an existing record if this appears to be a duplicate

checksum.description: SHA-256 of the image file if downloaded, for deduplication
